notes: non-technical user lost, explicit going-in-circles language, one hour elapsed

messages.content: my app won't load anymore, just a white screen. I built this whole thing with AI and I don't really know how to code

A white screen usually means a JavaScript error during render. The console shows `Hydration failed because the initial UI does not match`. I've wrapped the date display in a client-only component to stop the mismatch. Reload and check.
There's a second mismatch coming from the random ID in the sidebar. I've made the ID stable across server and client. Reload once more.
no change. what is a hydration

Hydration is when the browser takes over HTML the server rendered — if the two disagree, React bails out. I've now disabled server rendering for the whole dashboard page so nothing can disagree. Try again.
still a white screen. honestly I don't even understand what it's trying to do anymore, we've been going in circles for an hour
